entries.source: "Check my essay thesis"
entries.value: "Bincika my kasida thesis"

entries.source: "Give me a hint for this physics problem"
entries.value: "Give me a alama don this kimiyyar lissafi problem"

entries.source: "Help me start this word problem"
entries.value: "Taimako me fara this word problem"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Homework Coach on inspir for practice learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Wani jagora mai amfani don ta amfani da aikin gida koci a kan inspir don atisaye learning, tare da saƙonni, madaukai na karatu, da mafi aminci AI dabi’u.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Wani stronger madaukin karatu

entries.source: AI Homework Coach With Hints, Not Answer Dumping is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Get unstuck on homework with hints, examples, and checks that help you do the thinking yourself.
entries.value: Kocin Aikin Gida na AI da Alamu, ba Zubar da Amsa ba hanya ce mai mayar da hankali ta amfani da AI don koyo maimakon tara amsoshi kawai. An gina yanayin a kan aiki takamaimai: Get unstuck a kan aikin gida tare da alamomi, examples, da bincike that taimako kai do the thinking yourself.

entries.source: AI Homework Coach With Hints, Not Answer Dumping: practical guide
entries.value: Kocin Aikin Gida na AI da Alamu, ba Zubar da Amsa ba: jagora mai amfani

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Malamin AI

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Nemi a small farko mataki rather fiye da a final amsa.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Tambayi the AI don bincika naka tunani, ba kawai the result.

entries.source: Find the next step.
entries.value: Find the na gaba mataki.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Kammala ta rubutu the ra’ayi back daga ƙwaƙwalwa.

entries.source: Homework Coach
entries.value: Mai Horas da Aikin Gida

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Yi aiki

entries.source: Practice a similar problem.
entries.value: Atisaye a similar problem.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Saƙonni don gwada

entries.source: Start the live mode at Homework Coach. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Math Step Coach. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Fara the yanayi kai tsaye at aikin gida koci. If kai want a neighboring learning format, gwada lissafi mataki koci. don a broader duba na the dandali, karanta abin da an AI abokin koyo ya kamata do ga kowa.

entries.source: Students who need help starting a problem, checking work, or understanding a mistake.
entries.value: Daliban da suke bukatar taimako wajen fara matsala, duba aiki, ko fahimtar kuskure.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell the mode abin da kai suna trying don koyi ko produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Wannan difference shows up a cikin the flow. maimakon one giant response, the mafi kyau sessions move ta hanyar a madauki: saita a goal, gwada something, get martani, gyara the wurin rauni, da zaɓi the na gaba action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Wannan mayar da hankali yana da muhimmanci. Wani general chatbot can amsa almost anything, amma a yanayin koyo gives the conversation a siffa. It nudges kai toward the kind na thinking, atisaye, martani, ko exploration that helps the ra’ayi stick.

entries.source: The coach supports your thinking without taking over the assignment, so the final work stays yours.
entries.value: Kocin yana goyon bayan tunaninka ba tare da karbar aikin ba, don haka aikin karshe ya kasance naka.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Wannan shi ne the same dabi’a behind studying tare da AI ba tare da cheating yourself: keep the mai koyo mai aiki. AI shi ne most mai amfani lokacin da it gives kai martani a kan naka thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Wannan mode shi ne especially mai amfani don masu koyo who want don:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Gwada the mataki a cikin naka own words.

entries.source: Understand the mistake.
entries.value: Fahimci the kuskure.

entries.source: Use Homework Coach when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Amfani da aikin gida koci lokacin da kai want a zama that starts quickly amma still adapts don kai. farko goal ba don sauti impressive. farko goal shi ne don sa the na gaba mataki feel possible.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Abin da this mode helps tare da

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Inda don go na gaba

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Kai can also fara tare da a rough version na naka real problem. Wani messy farko saƙo shi ne fine. zama can clarify the mataki, masu amfani, wa’adi, da salo once kai begin.
